raw_consumer_statement: Dear Citi Card Disputes Department, I am writing to formally dispute several unauthorized transactions that appeared on my Best Buy Citi Card account ending in XXXX. These charges occurred in XX/XX/year> and include the following XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  {$310.00} on XX/XX/scrub>XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  {$440.00} on XX/XX/scrub>XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$260.00} on XX/XX/year>XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  {$190.00} on XX/XX/year> I did not authorize these transactions, nor have I made any purchases or ticket-related payments with these merchants. I reported these fraudulent charges previously, but I have not received a refund, and I have been charged interest on these disputed amounts, which is unacceptable and contrary to the Fair Credit Billing Act protections.
